# On the Freedom of the Will

*[Schopenhauer](../philosophers/schopenhauer.md) · 1839 · *Über die Freiheit des menschlichen Willens**

A prize essay crowned by the Royal Norwegian Society of Sciences, establishing that every act follows necessarily from character and motives: the freedom of indifference is an illusion, yet responsibility rests on the intelligible character inherited from Kant.
